\[
\ell (\boldsymbol {s}, k; C) := C _ {k} \log (1 + \sum_ {l (\neq k)} e ^ {- (s _ {k} - s _ {l})}) <   C _ {k} \log (1 + \sum_ {l (\neq k)} 1) = \ell (\boldsymbol {s} ^ {\prime}, k; C).
\]

\[

\]
